address: 1/339 Swanston St, Melbourne VIC 3000 (located in Melbourne Central)
review_summary_quotes: Loved it, Very Crunchy Chicken and good size portions of food.
For a place serving greasy fried food, that’s just basic hygiene being ignored.
-Tiny portions -Low quality -30$ does not even get close to filling you up

reviews.author: Ashlee Jayde
reviews.text: I visited Marrybrown for the first time in March 2026 on a Sunday evening for dinner with some friends. We were wandering through the CBD looking for something to eat and decided to give it a go. It's in a super central spot, with the State Library nearby.

reviews.author: kitty xin
reviews.text: It was off peak time and I was waiting for 10 minutes for my simple side dishes. The gravy was almost cold and chips was smaller than before. PH surcharge applied.

reviews.author: BB Kd
reviews.text: Ordered mashed potatoes takeaway all three were spoiled, with a rotten smell and sour taste. Completely inedible and unacceptable. Had to throw everything away. Waste of money.

reviews.author: Aiman Rashid
reviews.text: really bad experience i asked them to cut the burger in half and the asian guy in black shirt was so rude and keep on saying we dont do it here. PATHETIC customer service. the one in melbourne central they always cut the burger in half whenever i asked but swanston street need to get their staff trained properly!

reviews.author: Jimmy Low
reviews.text: I ordered two large fries, but the portion was tiny – nothing close to “large.” On top of that, the fries were cold and not fresh at all. This is not the first time: almost every order has either missing items, incorrect portions, or poor quality.

reviews.author: Prathamesh Gaikwad
reviews.text: I've given this restaurant multiple chances—tried it 4–5 times—and every single visit has been a disappointment. The food has way too much baking soda, leaving a strange aftertaste and ruining the entire meal. It's also obvious that they cut corners on quality.

reviews.author: Rocke
reviews.text: Best chicken burger for the price I've had. It's definitely better than a Zinger, actually spicy and bigger, too. That mayo they use is also amazing. The fried chicken is always cooked perfectly and a crispy coating. The original has a slight sweetness.

reviews.author: Shajee
reviews.text: A Disappointment from Start to Finish. I would definitely say this was the worst Marrybrown I've ever visited.

reviews.author: Shai N
reviews.text: It's located close to the melbourne central. I enjoyed the Nasi Lemak because it was so spicy and service was fast.

reviews.author: YiXuan Ong
reviews.text: I've had repeated issues with Marrybrown at Melbourne Central missing items from my orders. Most recently, I ordered the Nasi Kandar and it came without the curry sauce, which is a key part of the meal. This isn't the first time something was missing.
